pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh explicitly specify this path.
Task description and export_result.sh explicitly specify this path.
Task description instructs to add a new body tube of 'approximately 100mm length' (0.1m).
Task description explicitly states a mass of '30 grams (0.030 kg)'.
verifier.py enforces a minimum length threshold of 0.070m to award points.
verifier.py enforces a maximum length threshold of 0.130m to award points.
verifier.py enforces a minimum mass threshold of 0.020kg to award points.
verifier.py enforces a maximum mass threshold of 0.050kg to award points.
verifier.py requires a total score >= 60 to pass.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the standard 'simple_model_rocket.ork' file, verified as a real example authored by OpenRocket creator Sampo Niskanen. I verified the target paths (payload_integrated_rocket.ork and payload_report.txt) via explicit definitions in export scripts and task instructions. The modification targets of 100mm (0.1m) length and 30g (0.030kg) mass exactly match the explicit instructions, while the specific scoring tolerances (length 0.070-0.130m, mass 0.020-0.050kg) and passing threshold of 60 points were confirmed directly within the verifier logic.
